## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO performance, strategies, and lead generation initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [December saw increased impressions (530K) but lower clicks (3,100) than targeted (4,000)](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Focus on improving rankings for key terms: video commerce, interactive video, shoppable video](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [Implement lead capture strategies: gated content, lead magnets, UTM tracking on forms](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Enhance Google search results appearance with site links and schema markup](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Review

  - [December: 3,100 clicks (target: 4,000), 530K impressions (up from 350K in November)](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Significant impression boost for GrowthX articles (100K) vs existing blogs (50K)](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Clicks decreased despite doubled impressions (e.g., 58K to 96K impressions, but 532 to 470 clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Noticeable click drop in short-form video statistics and customer retention statistics articles](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Keyword Strategy

  - [Prioritize ranking for: video commerce, interactive video, shoppable video](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [De-emphasize Shopify video due to shift towards enterprise focus](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - Aim for top 5 rankings, ultimately targeting \#1 position for key terms
  - [Prateek to revamp content, improve internal linking for better rankings by end of February](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Lead Generation Initiatives

  - [Implement gated content on top 10 performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Explore lead magnets: free offers, ebooks, checklists, guides](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Create infographics as lead magnets, potentially using templated designs for scale](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Set up UTM tracking on all blog forms for better attribution](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Investigate HubSpot capabilities for tracking user journey across multiple sessions](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

### Website Optimization

  - [Research ways to improve Google search results appearance with site links](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Explore schema markup and other signals to prioritize important pages in search results](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Focus on bringing offline shopping experiences online](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Target community-related and UGC (User-Generated Content) keywords](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)

### Action Items and Next Steps

  - [Prateek to provide list of top 10 articles for gated content implementation](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Cameron to assist with UTM tracking setup on blog forms](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Winnie to investigate HubSpot capabilities for multi-session user journey tracking](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Prateek to research and report on improving site links in Google search results](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Create content buckets for UGC, offline-to-online, and community topics with 20-50 keywords each](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Track MQL (Marketing Qualified Leads) and SQL (Sales Qualified Leads) from organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Focus on actionable, results-oriented strategies and consistent communication](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement gated content on top 10 performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Set up UTM tracking on all blog forms](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Research and implement improvements for Google search results appearance](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Develop content strategy around UGC, offline-to-online, and community topics](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Create and share list of 20-50 keywords for each content bucket](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Establish tracking for MQLs and SQLs from organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Revamp content and improve internal linking for better keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/TrL2nVZxxgRwzf6M_2NhstAjykLw9sex?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
